name: value
description: Bound input value (strings only — for numbers/dates use `bind:value` and let `type` coerce).

name: placeholder
description: Placeholder text. Renders as a fake placeholder that fades on focus.

name: fieldState
description: Tints background / label / icon. Named `fieldState` to avoid colliding with the `$state` rune.

name: iconColor
description: When set, the icon background fills with this color on focus (and the glyph turns white). When unset, only the glyph color changes on focus.

name: mask
description: Mask pattern — string (e.g. `'###-###'`), alternatives array, or full maska options. Tokens: `#` digit, `@` letter, `*` alphanumeric.

name: message
description: Feedback message under the field; color follows `fieldState`.

name: field
description: Replaces the inner `<input>` element with arbitrary content (chips, filter input, custom display). The shell — bg, focus-ripple, label, icon button with `iconColor` focus-fill, variant + state styling — is preserved. The consumer is responsible for wiring their own `<input>` (mask / `value` / `oninput`) within the snippet. Receives the wrapper id and current focus state.

name: forceFocus
description: External force-focused override. When `true`, the field renders as if focused (icon lifts, ripple fills, label floats) regardless of real DOM focus. For composite controls (Select / DateTimePicker) that own their own activation state and need the trigger to look active while a popover is open.

name: oniconclick
description: Fires when the icon is clicked.
